Name: search_news_positional
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "search_news_positional" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news_positional"($1, $2) AS "_fn_search_news_positional") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."content" AS "content", "_root.base"."is_public" AS "is_public") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
